_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.
_publications._context: Immortalized human Schwann cells (iHSCs) were acquired from the laboratory of Dr. Margaret Wallace | iHSC lines were maintained and passaged at 37°C with 5% CO2 in DMEM high-glucose media supplemented with 10% FBS and penicillin/streptomycin

_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.
